jsonLd.title: Senior Instructional Designer at Jetking
jsonLd.description:
Jetking, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Agra operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Jetking:
Jetking is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jetking!
